holdings.infoBox: AVRY is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Block stock at 7.71%, Zoom Communications at 7.28%, Okta, Inc. at 6.19%, Clear Secure at 5.90%, and Amazon.com at 5.64%.

overview.description: The Avory Foundational ETF (AVRY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in US-listed equities identified to represent the future needs of consumers, enterprises, and markets. AVRY was launched on Jan 22, 2026 and is issued by Avory.
